transcript.text: Let's see if anybody shows up.
Nathan just flagged something on DataGrid.
So they changed their website, right?
So they've created, like, a new instance for their CMS in the backend and web flow.
I think you may be on mute, but that also might be intentional, but just letting you know.
I didn't know my camera was even on, so let me just out myself as being out of the house.
I'm glad you're out of the house.
I feel like you are, but remind me.
And I don't know if you're planning on celebrating Thanksgiving, but I hope that you have a nice time if you are with your family and stuff.
Home tomorrow to be with some family, which will be really nice.
Also, Vivek and I were just catching up, and I'm not sure if the rest of the team will be joining today.
So we kind of hop on just in case, but I noticed that most people, including Mark, declined the invite.
So we're probably going to hang around for a few more minutes.
And if there's anything you want to talk about, happy to cover.
Well, I'm like, it's probably classic me to be out of the know.
But I am, I'm, my, perfect.
You know, mostly I just joined to try to keep up or learn something new.
wasn't sure if I was connected yet.
Oh, it was like taking a while.
I couldn't hear if you could hear us.
But we were just chatting with Vanessa really quickly and Vivek and I were catching up.
Oh, if he declined, then we could all be on our merry way.
You weren't sure because I think Mark W.
had declined and we weren't quite sure.
So we figured we'd hop on and just see.
Yeah, I mean, unless I'm on communication with Mark when it's about this meeting, so...
Maybe we'll hang around Vivek for a couple more.
Just in case he shows up.
But yeah, you guys have a lovely holiday season.
I don't know if you guys are celebrating Thanksgiving or not, but yes, well, I don't know where you are, but I don't know if you do any sort of Thanksgiving celebration.
I didn't realize that you said Vivek.
Oh, no, because I know you're in the States.
was like, wait a second, you're in the States.
Vivek, feel free to jump in, please.
No, I don't personally celebrate, but I have been invited to a Friendsgiving tomorrow by one of my American friends.
Okay, I'll be watching the NFL at the very least.
Also, I do think Friendsgiving is the best version of Thanksgiving.
Especially when your friends all know how to cook at least one dish really well.
Nicolette, are you doing something, or are you celebrating?
Yeah, I'm just with my family.
All of my sisters are in town, so it's really nice.
I do like to cook, and I like to bake a lot, yeah.
It is my time to shine.
I'm grateful that I'm flying on Thanksgiving, and so there's kind of – I am not a huge baker or cook, and so it's kind of nice that – You alleviate your
I kind of just go from here to the food.
You two have a lovely day.
Well, I'm going to guess that this is kind of, this is off, but, um, yeah, you know, I feel like five is respectable and, um, but a couple more minutes if we want to wait.
Um, so what was, yeah, the data grid thing.
So they have like two CMSs now and the number of URLs on both are not the same.
So Nathan was like, he just flagged it to me and he keeps DMing me with the stuff.
I'm like, I don't know why he keeps doing that.
So, um, I just told him like, yeah, just, just export the two tables and run a VLOOKUP and see like, which is missing.
I mean, that's pretty much it.
So you might see that come by in the DataGrid channel.
I would be curious if, just because they had so many pages before, if they took this opportunity to do a little bit of pruning and maybe, hopefully they did it.
Oh, it's the other way around.
So the new one has more.
So we had actually pruned a bunch of stuff and I think maybe they undid some of that stuff.
I bet they used an older version or something and the pruning wasn't taken into account.
I mean, it took them just, what, one year?
So it's not asking too much for them to get it right, is it?
Well, thank you for the heads up.
I can connect with Nathan about that if he needs anything else.
Or I'll keep an eye out on the internal.
I think the contract, Bridget said, Marcel's meeting Tiago tomorrow.
I'll talk to you later, I guess.
But maybe I don't think we have any more calls today.
I'm just going to go sleep, honestly.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync canceled due to key stakeholder absence.](https://fathom.video/share/LxVHS4nKaajHPuhQxHUX2HNJYzQ-hTUT?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [The sync was canceled after Mark S. declined the invite, indicating no critical updates were ready.](https://fathom.video/share/LxVHS4nKaajHPuhQxHUX2HNJYzQ-hTUT?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
  - [**DataGrid:** A new Webflow CMS instance has more URLs than the old one, possibly reverting prior content pruning.](https://fathom.video/share/LxVHS4nKaajHPuhQxHUX2HNJYzQ-hTUT?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
  - [**Contract:** Marcel and Tiago are meeting tomorrow to sign the contract.](https://fathom.video/share/LxVHS4nKaajHPuhQxHUX2HNJYzQ-hTUT?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)

## Topics

### Meeting Cancellation

  - [The sync was canceled after key stakeholder Mark S. declined the invite.](https://fathom.video/share/LxVHS4nKaajHPuhQxHUX2HNJYzQ-hTUT?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
  - [Other attendees (Vanessa, Nicolette) confirmed the meeting was effectively over.](https://fathom.video/share/LxVHS4nKaajHPuhQxHUX2HNJYzQ-hTUT?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)

### DataGrid Website Update

  - [DataGrid launched a new Webflow CMS instance.](https://fathom.video/share/LxVHS4nKaajHPuhQxHUX2HNJYzQ-hTUT?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - [**Problem:** The new instance contains more URLs than the old one.](https://fathom.video/share/LxVHS4nKaajHPuhQxHUX2HNJYzQ-hTUT?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
  - [**Hypothesis:** This may revert prior content pruning, possibly from using an older site version.](https://fathom.video/share/LxVHS4nKaajHPuhQxHUX2HNJYzQ-hTUT?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
  - [**Solution:** Vivek advised Nathan to export URL lists and run a VLOOKUP to identify the differences.](https://fathom.video/share/LxVHS4nKaajHPuhQxHUX2HNJYzQ-hTUT?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)

### Contract Status

  - [The contract is ready for signing.](https://fathom.video/share/LxVHS4nKaajHPuhQxHUX2HNJYzQ-hTUT?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)
  - [Marcel and Tiago are meeting tomorrow (Thanksgiving) to sign it.](https://fathom.video/share/LxVHS4nKaajHPuhQxHUX2HNJYzQ-hTUT?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Nathan (GrowthX):** Export URL lists from the old and new DataGrid CMS instances and run a VLOOKUP to compare them.](https://fathom.video/share/LxVHS4nKaajHPuhQxHUX2HNJYzQ-hTUT?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
  - [**Mara (GrowthX):** Monitor the internal DataGrid channel for updates and offer support to Nathan.](https://fathom.video/share/LxVHS4nKaajHPuhQxHUX2HNJYzQ-hTUT?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
  - [**Marcel & Tiago (Rapyd):** Meet tomorrow to sign the contract.](https://fathom.video/share/LxVHS4nKaajHPuhQxHUX2HNJYzQ-hTUT?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)
